3088790.name: Market master Simulator
3088790.description:
Welcome to Market Master Simulator, the ultimate supermarket management simulation game where you take full control of your very own market. Dive into the dynamic world of retail, manage your employees, and turn your humble store into a bustling marketplace.

Gameplay Features:

Manage Your Supermarket: Oversee all aspects of your store, from hiring and managing employees to stocking shelves with a wide variety of products.
Produce and Sell Goods: Buy animals and create your own products, or source them from suppliers to offer a diverse range of items to your customers.
Advanced Electric System: Implement a sophisticated electric system with bindable/unbindable cables. Ensure your lights, fridges, and other essential equipment are powered efficiently.
Renewable Energy and Power Management: Utilize generators, batteries, solar panels, and static power systems. Set up logical systems to switch between power sources automatically based on the time of day, optimizing your energy usage and minimizing costs.
Challenge Your Management Skills: Balance your budget, keep your customers happy, and expand your market. Overcome unique challenges to become the ultimate market master.
3088790.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 保加利亚语, 捷克语, 荷兰语, 希腊语, 匈牙利语, 印度尼西亚语, 波兰语, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 罗马尼亚语, 俄语, 土耳其语
